title: Easy Netherite Ingots
description: Bothered by how much gold and ancient debris netherite takes to make? Bothered by other plugins that try to add too many random recipies and need a cheaper alternative than mining for hours for your server? Install Easy Netherite Ingots
body:
# **Easy Netherite Ingots**

Easy Netherite Ingots modifies the vanilla Netherite Ingot crafting recipe with a custom layout.

## Plugin Features

Removes the default Netherite Ingot recipe to prevent confusion

Slightly changes the crafting layout while reducing the total gold required.

## Compatibility

Paper / Spigot 1.20+

Lightweight mod, close to no memory/ram usage and low space on hard drives

No commands, permission plugins, and no config required, just add it to your server plugin folder and restart the server. The plugin will automatically configurate itself and will almost never conflict with other plugins.

## Crafting Layout

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0c2e313a648732ebc509422e8b58382f6b65c80.png)
